localizedRessources.ALLP.text.Baggage.Title: Checked Baggage Allowance
localizedRessources.ALLP.text.Baggage.Note:
When travelling on a Qantas operated service, free baggage allowance is included in your fare. Our checked baggage allowances are determined according to your itinerary and the carriers that are involved in your journey. Allowances are displayed when you select your flight on qantas.com and continue to the ‘Options’ page. Once you have booked your flight, you can view your allowances in Manage Booking by selecting ‘View Allowances'.

Find out our checked and carry-on baggage allowances:

  • Economy
  • Premium-Economy
  • Business
  • First
  • Carry-on Baggage

    • Baggage allowance exceptions exist for Dash-8 and Lord Howe, Norfolk, Christmas and Cocos Island flights. No single piece of baggage can exceed 32kgs. If you need to bring a bit extra, you may wish to purchase Additional Baggage allowance and save on airport prices. Find out more on checked and carry-on baggage.

other.label: Important Information
other.fullTextValue:
For bookings made through Qantas Contact Centres and selected Qantas airport locations as well as web chat and selected social media channels in some countries, a booking fee applies.
Changes can be made online via Manage Booking, otherwise call 13 13 13

changeFee.label: Changes
changeFee.fullTextValue:
Permitted up until Check in closes.
  • No change fee applies.
  • Your flight can only be changed to a new fare of equal or higher value.
  • Alternatively, a Flight Credit can be used to book fares lower than your original ticket price and can be used towards multiple bookings.
  • There may be a fare difference between the fare for your new booking and the original fare.

Not permitted after Check-in closes, including no shows.

Fees are not payable where you are entitled to a refund or alternative flight under the Australian Consumer Law or Conditions of Carriage.

Fees listed in the fare rules may vary depending on when your ticket was purchased. The applicable fee will be displayed prior to cancellation or change.

children.label: Children and infants
children.fullTextValue: No discount applies for children aged 2–11 years occupying a seat; the adult fare will be charged. Infants under 2 years are free if not occupying a seat. Infants must be accompanied, with a maximum of one infant per adult travelling.

Qantas Points and Status credits may be earned on this fare.
This fare is classed as Business for the purposes of calculating how many Qantas Points and Status credits you earn, or how many Qantas Points you need to redeem a Classic Upgrade Reward.
When points are earned on this fare, Minimum Points Guarantee applies.

cancellationNoShow.label: Cancellation (including no show)
cancellationNoShow.fullTextValue:
Cancel for a Flight Credit
Permitted when cancelled up until Check-in closes.
  • Flight Credits can be used to book fares lower than your original ticket price and can be used towards multiple bookings.
  • There may be a fare difference between the fare for your new booking and the original fare.
  • You must book and travel within 12 months of the original booking date.

Read the complete Flight Credit terms and conditions.

Not permitted when cancelled after Check-in closes, including no shows.

Fees are not payable where you are entitled to a refund or alternative flight under the Australian Consumer Law or Conditions of Carriage.

Cancel for a Refund
Permitted before and after departure of the first flight in your booking.
  • If this fare is combined with another fare the most restrictive refund conditions apply for the booking.

Fees listed in the fare rules may vary depending on when your ticket was purchased. The applicable fee will be displayed prior to cancellation or change.

cancellationNoShow.label: Cancellation (including no show)
cancellationNoShow.fullTextValue:
Fees are not payable where you are entitled to a refund or alternative flight under the Australian Consumer Law or Conditions of Carriage.

  • If your itinerary contains only Classic Plus Flight Rewards or contains both Classic Flight Rewards and Classic Plus Flight Rewards, then the following conditions apply:

    (b) Once any travel has commenced on a Classic Flight Reward, the Reward is considered used, even if the remaining travel is not completed.
    (c) Refer to clause 14.6 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • If you combine Classic Plus Flight Rewards with non-Classic Flight Reward fares ("Commercial Fares"), refer to the Commercial Fare conditions and clause 15.5 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • In accordance with the US Department of Transportation rules, customers who redeem a Classic Plus Flight Reward ticket in the United States may cancel their booking and have their ticket refunded without incurring the Cancellation Refund Fee within 24 hours of ticketing when the ticket was purchased one week or more prior to scheduled departure of the first flight in the itinerary.
  • On the day of scheduled departure if you fail to board a Flight Segment (no show) the Qantas Points for that Segment will be forfeited and are Non-refundable.

eligibility.label: Eligibility
eligibility.fullTextValue:
A Classic Flight Reward on Qantas and partner airlines can include:
  • Qantas Flight only
  • Partner airline flights only, or
  • A combination of Qantas and partner airline flights

The Qantas Points required for a Classic Flight Reward on Qantas and partner airlines are calculated based on a one way trip or a series of one way trips using the Qantas Classic Flight Reward table, Jetstar Classic Flight Reward table and/or the Partner Classic Flight Reward table. However, if your Classic Flight Reward includes travel on at least two oneworld® Alliance Airlines other than Qantas, and does not include travel on any airline outside of the oneworld® Alliance Airlines, the Qantas Points required will be calculated using the oneworld® Classic Flight Reward table, and will be based on a return itinerary.
Important information: eligibility for First Class on itineraries containing an Emirates (EK) flight is strictly limited to passengers who are nine (9) years of age or older at the time of departure from the point of origin of the first flight segment on the itinerary. Emirates First reward seats can only be booked by Qantas Frequent Flyers with Silver status or higher (subject to availability). Any non-compliant booking will be cancelled and a refund will be issued.

fullTextRules.label: Qantas Frequent Flyer Program

fullTextRules.label: Jetstar Information

teaserRules.label: Changes
teaserRules.fullTextValue:
Fees are not payable where you are entitled to a refund or alternative flight under the Australian Consumer Law or Conditions of Carriage.
  • If you make a permitted change to your Classic Flight Rewards(s) only itinerary, the fare difference must be paid in Qantas Points, and any additional taxes, fees and carrier charges must be paid in money.
    For all other itineraries where a change is permitted, any difference must be paid in money.
    A Change Fee per passenger will apply. A Service Fee may apply when making changes over the phone with a Qantas consultant. See the Fee Schedule.
  • If your itinerary contains only a Classic Flight Reward(s), then changes must be in line with clause 14.5 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • If your Itinerary includes one or more Qantas Classic Flight Reward Segment(s) and one or more Classic Plus Flight Reward Segment(s), and you change:
    (a) one or more Qantas Classic Reward Segment(s) and one or more Classic Plus Reward Segment(s); or
    (b) only the Classic Plus Flight Reward Segments,
    those changes must be in line with clause 15.2 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • If your Itinerary includes one or more Qantas or Airline Partner Classic Flight Reward Segment(s) and one or more Classic Plus Flight Reward Segment(s), and you change:
    (a) both the Airline Partner Classic Flight Reward Segment and the Classic Plus Flight Reward Segment(s); or
    (b) only the Classic Flight Reward Segment(s); or
    (c) only the Classic Plus Flight Reward Segment,
    those changes must be in line with clause 14.7 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • If you combine Classic Flight Rewards with non-Classic Flight Reward fares ("Commercial Fares"), refer to the Commercial Fare conditions and clause 14.8 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • Make changes online at qantas.com/managebooking or call your local Qantas office.

teaserRules.label: Standard seats

eligibility.label: Eligibility
eligibility.fullTextValue:
A Classic Flight Reward on Qantas and partner airlines can include:
  • Qantas Flight only
  • Partner airline flights only, or
  • A combination of Qantas and partner airline flights

The Qantas Points required for a Classic Flight Reward on Qantas and partner airlines are calculated based on a one way trip or a series of one way trips using the Qantas Classic Flight Reward table, Jetstar Classic Flight Reward table and/or the Partner Classic Flight Reward table. However, if your Classic Flight Reward includes travel on at least two oneworld® Alliance Airlines other than Qantas, and does not include travel on any airline outside of the oneworld® Alliance Airlines, the Qantas Points required will be calculated using the oneworld® Classic Flight Reward table, and will be based on a return itinerary.
Important information: eligibility for First Class on itineraries containing an Emirates (EK) flight is strictly limited to passengers who are nine (9) years of age or older at the time of departure from the point of origin of the first flight segment on the itinerary. Emirates First reward seats can only be booked by Qantas Frequent Flyers with Silver status or higher (subject to availability). Any non-compliant booking will be cancelled and a refund will be issued.

  • A change fee of $99 AUD per person applies to bookings made on or before 29 July 2025.

  • Your flight can only be changed to a new fare of equal or higher value.
  • Alternatively, a Flight Credit can be used to book fares lower than your original ticket price and can be used towards multiple bookings.

eligibility.label: Eligibility
eligibility.fullTextValue:
A Classic Plus Flight Reward on Qantas:
  • Qantas Flight only
The Qantas Points required for a Classic Plus Flight Reward are quoted on qantas.com at the time of booking.

changeFee.label: Changes
changeFee.fullTextValue:
Fees are not payable where you are entitled to a refund or alternative flight under the Australian Consumer Law or Conditions of Carriage.

  • If you make a permitted change, any fare difference and any additional taxes, fees and carrier charges, must be paid in money.
    A Change Fee per passenger will apply. A Service Fee may apply when making changes over the phone with a Qantas consultant. See the Fee Schedule.
  • If your itinerary contains only a Classic Plus Flight Reward(s), then changes must be in line with clause 15.2 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • If your Itinerary includes one or more Qantas Classic Flight Reward Segment(s) and one or more Classic Plus Flight Reward Segment(s), and you change:
    (a) one or more Qantas Classic Reward Segment(s) and one or more Classic Plus Reward Segment(s); or
    (b) only the Classic Plus Flight Reward Segments,those changes must be in line with clause 15.2 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • If your Itinerary includes one or more Qantas or Airline Partner Classic Flight Reward Segment(s) and one or more Classic Plus Flight Reward Segment(s), and you change:
    (a) both the Airline Partner Classic Flight Reward Segment and the Classic Plus Flight Reward Segment(s); or
    (b) only the Classic Flight Reward Segment(s); or
    (c) only the Classic Plus Flight Reward Segment,those changes must be in line with clause 14.7 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • If you combine Classic Plus Flight Rewards with non-Classic Flight Reward fares ("Commercial Fares"), refer to the Commercial Fare conditions and clause 15.4 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • Make changes online at qantas.com/managebooking (or call your local Qantas office).

For the purposes of redeeming Qantas Points for a Classic Upgrade Reward, these are classed as Classic Plus Flight Reward Economy, Classic Plus Flight Reward Premium Economy, or Classic Plus Flight Reward Business based on the original cabin booked.

cancellationNoShow.label: Cancellation (including no show)
cancellationNoShow.fullTextValue:
Fees are not payable where you are entitled to a refund or alternative flight under the Australian Consumer Law or Conditions of Carriage.

  • If your itinerary contains only Classic Plus Flight Rewards or contains both Classic Flight Rewards and Classic Plus Flight Rewards, then the following conditions apply:
    (a) Requests to cancel a Classic Flight Reward ticket (where permitted) and re-credit Qantas Points may be submitted for refund and re-credit prior to commencement of any travel on the itinerary. A Cancellation Refund Fee (see the Fee Schedule) will apply.
    (b) Once any travel has commenced on a Classic Flight Reward, the Reward is considered used, even if the remaining travel is not completed.
    (c) Refer to clause 14.6 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • If you combine Classic Plus Flight Rewards with non-Classic Flight Reward fares ("Commercial Fares"), refer to the Commercial Fare conditions and clause 15.5 of the QFF T&Cs.
  • In accordance with the US Department of Transportation rules, customers who redeem a Classic Plus Flight Reward ticket in the United States may cancel their booking and have their ticket refunded without incurring the Cancellation Refund Fee within 24 hours of ticketing when the ticket was purchased one week or more prior to scheduled departure of the first flight in the itinerary.
  • On the day of scheduled departure if you fail to board a Flight Segment (no show) the Qantas Points for that Segment will be forfeited and are Non-refundable.
